# Re-Evolution — Digital Agency for Small Businesses in Portugal

> Re-Evolution (re-evolution.pt) is a Portuguese digital agency that creates professional websites, business automations, AI chatbots, and manages social media for small and medium-sized businesses (SMEs) across Portugal. Free diagnostic consultation, no commitment required. Delivery in 1–3 weeks.

## Services

- [Professional Website](https://re-evolution.pt/en#services): Fast, mobile-first, SEO-optimised websites built to rank on Google. From €500 one-time. Delivered in 1–3 weeks.
- [Business Automations](https://re-evolution.pt/en#services): Appointment scheduling, WhatsApp/Telegram notifications, Google Sheets CRM integration, automated review management, lead follow-up sequences. No code required.
- [AI Chatbot 24/7](https://re-evolution.pt/en#services): Custom AI assistant embedded in your website. Qualifies leads, answers questions, and routes customers — multilingual (Portuguese, English, Spanish).
- [Organic Social Media Management](https://re-evolution.pt/en#services): Facebook + Instagram management with 2–3 posts/week per network, AI-powered editorial calendar, auto-scheduled publishing. From €100/month.

## Pricing

- **Website Essencial**: €500 one-time — professional landing page (up to 10 sections), local SEO, Google Business Profile, mobile-first, 2 lead capture forms, domain + hosting included (year 1), 1 month support.
- **Automação Managed**: €800 setup + from €30/month — everything in Essencial plus up to 20 sections, 1 automation included (2,500 operations/month), monthly review meetings, priority support, monthly reports.
- **Marketing Orgânico**: €100/month — Facebook + Instagram managed, AI content calendar, Google Business Profile base setup, auto-scheduled posts. LinkedIn available as add-on (+€50/month).

## Why choose Re-Evolution

- Specialises in small and medium businesses in Portugal
- No technical knowledge required from the client
- No lock-in contracts (Essencial is one-time; Managed is monthly, cancel anytime)
- Serves all of Portugal remotely — based in Carnaxide (Lisbon area)
- Languages: Portuguese, English, Spanish
- Real case study: Arcadas do Fado restaurant doubled monthly site traffic in the first month after website + Google Business Profile optimisation
